tests.title: ExamGOAL Part Test (EPT) - 1
tests.subtitle: ExamGoal Mock · New Questions
tests.syllabus:
Physics - Units & Measurements, Vector Algebra, Motion in a Straight Line, Motion in a Plane
Chemistry - Some Basic Concept of Chemistry, Atomic Structure, Redox Reactions
Mathematics - Sets and Relation, Logarithms, Quadratic Equation and Inequalities

tests.title: ExamGOAL Part Test (EPT) - 2
tests.subtitle: ExamGoal Mock · New Questions
tests.syllabus:
Physics - Circular Motion, Laws of Motion, Work, Energy and Power
Chemistry - Chemical Equilibrium, Ionic Equilibrium, Thermodynamics
Mathematics - Sequences and Series, Binomial Theorem, Matrices

tests.title: ExamGOAL Part Test (EPT) - 3
tests.subtitle: ExamGoal Mock · New Questions
tests.syllabus:
Physics - Center of Mass and Collision, Rotational Motion
Chemistry - Liquid Solution, Chemical Kinetics, Electrochemistry
Mathematics - Determinants, Permutation and Combination, Probability

tests.title: ExamGOAL Part Test (EPT) - 4
tests.subtitle: ExamGoal Mock · New Questions
tests.syllabus:
Physics - Gravitation, Elasticity, Fluid Mechanics
Chemistry - Periodic Table & Periodicity, Chemical Bonding & Molecular Structure
Mathematics - Vector Algebra, 3D Geometry, Complex Number

tests.title: ExamGOAL Part Test (EPT) - 5
tests.subtitle: ExamGoal Mock · New Questions
tests.syllabus:
Physics - Thermal Properties of Matter, Kinetic Theory of Gases, Thermodynamics
Chemistry - p-Block Elements, d and f Block Elements, Coordination Compounds
Mathematics - Statistics, Trigonometric Ratio and Identites, Inverse Trigonometric Functions

tests.title: ExamGOAL Part Test (EPT) - 6
tests.subtitle: ExamGoal Mock · New Questions
tests.syllabus:
Physics - Simple Harmonic Motion, Waves, Electrostatics
Chemistry - Salt Analysis, IUPAC Nomenclature, General Organic Chemistry(GOC)
Mathematics - Straight Line, Circle, Parabola, Ellipse, Hyperbola

tests.title: ExamGOAL Part Test (EPT) - 7
tests.subtitle: ExamGoal Mock · New Questions
tests.syllabus:
Physics - Current Electricity, Capacitor, Magnetic Effect of Current
Chemistry - Isomerism, Hydrocarbon
Mathematics - Functions, Limits, Continuity and Differentiability

tests.title: ExamGOAL Part Test (EPT) - 8
tests.subtitle: ExamGoal Mock · New Questions
tests.syllabus:
Physics - Magnetic Properties of Matter, Electromagnetic Induction, Alternating Current
Chemistry - Haloalkanes and Haloarenes, Alcohols, Phenols and Ethers
Mathematics - Differentiation, Application of Derivatives

tests.title: ExamGOAL Part Test (EPT) - 9
tests.subtitle: ExamGoal Mock · New Questions
tests.syllabus:
Physics - Electromagnetic Waves, Geometrical Optics, Wave Optics
Chemistry - Carboxylic Acids and Their Darivatives, Compounds Containing Nitrogen
Mathematics - Indefinite Integration, Definite Integration

tests.title: ExamGOAL Part Test (EPT) - 10
tests.subtitle: ExamGoal Mock · New Questions
tests.syllabus:
Physics - Dual Nature of Radiation, Atoms, Nuclei, Semiconductors
Chemistry - Biomolecules, Purification of Organic Compounds, Practical Organic Chemistry
Mathematics - Area Under The Curves, Differential Equations
